overview.description: The WisdomTree Yield Enhanced U.S. Short-Term Aggregate Bond Fund (SHAG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of USD-denominated investment-grade securities with maturities of less than five years. The index consists of 13 subcomponents weighted for yield-to-worst. SHAG was launched on May 18, 2017 and is issued by WisdomTree.
